title: pelargonium × tyrianthinum
intro: Pelargonium × tyrianthinum, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains geraniol, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and digestive issues. Rose Geranium essential oil can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and aromatherapy blends, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and holistic wellness practices.
